description.en: DenseNet connected each layer to every later layer within a dense block. This encouraged feature reuse, improved gradient flow, and offered a compact alternative to simply making networks wider or deeper.
description.zh: DenseNet 在密集块中把每一层连接到后续所有层。这促进了特征复用，改善了梯度流动，并提供了比单纯加宽或加深网络更紧凑的方案。

subcaption.en: Architecture visual used by the project.

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
license.zh: 本地原创 SVG 重绘；未复制来源图形。

review.imagePolicy: Do not use new remote images in production until source and license are verified.
nextSteps: Open sources.json and pages/ to verify primary facts.
Record accepted/rejected image candidates in notes.md.
Move approved assets into resources/images only after review.
